textPlain: C++ was so much cleaner in the 90s, when it was still essentially "C with classes," which is how I like to use the language. Modern standards have turned it into an ugly mess.
Heard about this watching Casey Muratori's "The Big OOPs" talk [0]. Thought it couldn't be _that_ Hickey, but turns out it was![0] https://youtu.be/wo84LFzx5nI?si=SBv1UqgtKJ1BH3Cw&t=5159
